Frequently Asked Questions

Get answers to the most common questions about our plumbing company services.

How do I know if I have a clogged drain?

Common signs include slow drainage, gurgling sounds coming from the drain, and foul odors.

What is hydro-jetting?

Hydro-jetting uses high-pressure water to blast away stubborn blockages and buildup from the inside of your pipes.

How can I prevent clogged drains?

Avoid pouring grease down the drain, use drain strainers to catch hair and debris, and flush your drains regularly with hot water.

Reviews From Our Plumbing Company Customers

See what our satisfied customers have to say about their experience.

"Our old water heater finally gave out during the hottest week of July. Phoenix Plumbers & Drain Clean Services came out the same day and had a new one installed quickly. The technician was professional and explained everything clearly. Great service!"

Maria G. Water Heater Replacement

"Had a stubborn kitchen sink clog that I couldn't clear myself. They were able to get it flowing again in no time. The price was reasonable, and the plumber was friendly."

David S. Drain Cleaning

"We had a major sewer line backup that was causing serious problems. Phoenix Plumbers & Drain Clean Services used their camera to find the issue (tree roots!) and fixed it with minimal digging. Very impressed with their expertise."

Lisa K. Sewer Line Repair
